---
title: "Hugh Francis Elgie, later Elgee"
---

## Hugh Francis Elgie, later Elgee

**Dates:** (1878- 6 July 1915)

### Description

son of the Rev. W.F. Elgie

### Biography

Captain South Wales Borderers, killed in action at Gallipoli [tablet in Otterbourne Church]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
